text: moved 3 times in 2 years and i still cant find my good spatula
the ikea dresser won. i am defeated. 4 hours and 3 extra screws left over
been wandering home depot for 45 min. came for lightbulbs. currently looking at tile
painted the bedroom "gentle sage" and it looks like shrek's bathroom
tried to fix the leaky faucet myself. kitchen is now a splash pad
alexa turned on all the lights at 3am because she heard a racoon outside
wifi dies the exact moment i sit on the toilet. every single time
neighbor got a riding mower for his 0.1 acre lot. i feel personally attacked
bought a succulent because they're "impossible to kill." it died in 6 days
just saw my mortgage statement and laughed so i wouldnt cry
moving truck showed up 4 hours late and the driver asked ME for directions
the bookshelf instructions are in swedish and my marriage is in danger
went to home depot for a washer. left with a firepit and no washer
picked "arctic white" paint. its yellow. very obviously yellow
youtube said i could replace the toilet myself. youtube lied
my smart thermostat decided 85F was a good sleeping temperature last night
theres a 2 foot dead zone right where the couch is. the ONLY spot
neighbors lawn looks like a golf course. mine looks like a crime scene
my fern collection is now a pot collection. just pots. empty pots
interest rates went up again and i physically felt my soul leave
labeled every box "misc" during the move. past me is a monster
3 allen wrenches deep into this desk build and the dog ate step 7
home depot guy asked if i needed help and i almost started crying
accent wall looks great in the can. looks like a bruise on the wall
water heater decided to retire at 6am on a monday. no warning. just cold
the smart lock locked me out of my own house. in the rain. barefoot
mesh network with 3 nodes and the garage still has zero signal
neighbor pressure washed his driveway at 7am saturday. we are at war now
tried to keep a cactus alive. somehow overwatered it. HOW
30 year mortgage sounds fake. ill be so old. why did i do this
movers broke my grandmas lamp and offered me $12 compensation
this bed frame has 47 pieces and one of them is already stripped
lost in the plumbing aisle again. send help or at least snacks
the paint color is called moonlit pearl. its beige. everything is beige
put drano in the sink and now it smells like a chemical plant
google home plays my neighbors music. i did not ask for reggaeton at 6am
wifi extender extended nothing. just added a blinking light to the hallway
guy next door has Christmas lights up year round. its april bro
every plant i buy is just a slow funeral i paid $14 for
closing costs were a surprise horror movie nobody warned me about
uhaul reservation meant nothing apparently. "we dont have any trucks" cool cool
gf and i havent spoken since the wardrobe assembly incident of last tuesday
home depot at 9pm on a weeknight hits different. we are all lost souls
chose a bold red for the kitchen. it looks like a crime scene now
garbage disposal ate a fork and now sounds like a dying robot
smart blinds open every morning at 6. i work nights. we are enemies
router is in the living room. signal doesnt reach the living room
neighbor mows in a diagonal pattern. showoff. absolute showoff
bought 6 herbs for the windowsill. basil lasted longest at 11 days
property tax bill just dropped and im pretty sure its a typo right?? right???
moved the couch 14 times. it goes back to the first spot every time
tv stand instructions said 30 min assembly. its been 3 hours and i have blood
wandered into the garden section for "just a look" spent $200 on pots
sample looked like ocean mist. wall looks like toothpaste. minty fresh nightmare
tried to snake the drain. the snake is now also stuck in the drain
ring doorbell notifies me about every leaf blowing past. 47 alerts today
5g router 2 bars in the bedroom. full bars in the crawlspace. makes sense
neighbor hired a landscaping crew. for his balcony. a balcony
my aloe vera turned to mush. it survived a desert but not my apartment
escrow is just a word they made up to take more money right
everything i own is in garbage bags because i ran out of boxes at 2am
this shelf unit wants me to "hand tighten" with the strength of a machine
spent 2 hrs in home depot. left with a single pack of command strips
"eggshell finish" was a mistake. looks like cottage cheese on the ceiling
glued the pvc pipe wrong. plumber laughed at me. fair honestly
roomba mapped my house wrong and now lives under the couch permanently
the one outlet in the bathroom trips if you look at it wrong
my lawn is 40% dandelion and my neighbor called it "bold" passive aggressively
fiddle leaf fig dropped all leaves the day after i bought a humidifier for it
first mortgage payment hit and i just stared at my bank app for 10 min
hired movers and they showed up with a minivan. for a 2 bedroom apt
the dowels dont fit the holes. none of them. not a single one
home depot parking lot at sunset is my therapy now
test painted 9 grays. they all look blue now. im losing my mind
tried to install a bidet. flooded the bathroom. wife wont look at me
alexa ordered 40 lbs of cat food because the tv said "cat"
signal drops in the kitchen. specifically at the table. where i eat and scroll
neighbor leaf blows at 7am every single saturday. im building a fence
peace lily. name is ironic because it has brought me zero peace
PMI is just punishment for not being born rich apparently
friends helped move but "helped" is doing a lot of heavy lifting there. unlike them
drawer slides are on backwards. found out after fully assembling the whole dresser
been in the lighting section for 30 min. i dont even need lights
painted the bathroom door shut. discovered this at 2am. in the bathroom
toilet wont stop running. ive jiggled the handle 400 times. calling a priest
smart plug turned off the fish tank filter overnight. fish are judging me
powerline adapter gets 2 mbps. carrier pigeon would be faster tbh
neighbor has a doorbell camera pointed right at my recycling shame
snake plant. THE unkillable plant. mine turned to yellow mush in a month
appraisal came in low and now i know what despair tastes like
elevator was broken on moving day. 4th floor walkup. 97 degrees outside
extra parts leftover from the table build. its fine. probably decorative
home depot employee saw me crying in flooring and just nodded. he gets it
primer coat looked perfect. paint coat looked like a kindergarten project
tightened the faucet too hard. handle came off in my hand. water everywhere
smart fridge told me to buy milk. i already have milk. we are fighting
wifi works perfectly when the repair guy shows up. every. single. time
neighbors kid keeps kicking balls into my yard. i have 7 now. theyre mine
spider plant had babies and they all died. generational trauma in my living room
refinancing sounded great until i saw the closing costs again. AGAIN
